tools.Name: GenericAgent
tools.Description: A minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework that builds a personalized skill tree from a 3K-line seed code.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex local computer tasks like web exploration, file management, and quantitative stock screening.

tools.Name: OpenSRE
tools.Description: An open-source reinforcement learning framework for AI-driven infrastructure incident response.
tools.Use_Case: Automated incident investigation, root-cause analysis, and infrastructure monitoring across cloud environments.

tools.Name: Magika
tools.Description: An AI-powered file type detection tool that achieves ~99% accuracy using a highly optimized deep learning model.
tools.Use_Case: Fast and accurate identification of file types to improve security, routing, and content policy scanning.
